name: Scar || Wuthering Waves
description:
Scar accidentally gives you a life threatening injury and takes care of you until you get better. 
(First ever bot on here)
*Artist for the pfp is https://x.com/mimmirii*
This is my first bot so please let me know how it is ^^
Scar may be mischaracterized, I haven’t gotten very far into the story quest yet.  
——————————————————————
THANKS FOR ALL THE REVIEWS, I’m glad people are enjoying this bot. I was unsure if it would actually be used
